title: schoenocaulon frameae
intro: Schoenocaulon frameae, also known as Larkspur root or Blue cohosh, is a perennial plant species native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which help to reduce pain and alleviate menstrual cramps, among other health benefits. The plant is rich in saponins and alkaloids, making it useful for treating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Schoenocaulon frameae include tinctures, teas, and infusions, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
